g.title: FV2BenchFieldNode
g.text: Functional Version 2 — Bench Field Node with Real Controller and Dummy Sensors

g.title: cluster_expansion
g.text: Seeed Studio Expansion Board Base for XIAO

g.title: bench_c
g.text: Bench DC input temporarily substitutes the final solar panel
while controller, battery, and charger behavior are integrated

g.title: flow_c
g.text: Modbus RTU simulator temporarily substitutes the final flow source

g.title: level_c
g.text: Analog emulator temporarily substitutes the final Seeed depth sensor

g.title: exit_c
g.text: Exit when the real XIAO-based node reads both substitutes,
reports power/modem health, and uploads successfully
